# Introduction

Welcome to the **Base Track** for Legal, an AI-powered financial analysis platform for businesses operating globally. This lab manual will guide you through building a sleek React dashboard that integrates with our n8n swarm, allowing users to leverage Lovable (or v0/Cursor) to generate tailored insights.

## Goal
Design and develop a One-Page Dashboard web app using React that connects to your Session 03 n8n Webhook. The goal is to create an intuitive interface for analyzing financial data from various sources, providing real-time recommendations based on user queries.

## Step-by-Step Guide

### Step 1: Set up the Lovable development environment

Log into [Lovable](https://lovable.dev) and create a new project. Follow the prompts to set up your workspace.

### Step 2: Create a React app and connect to n8n Swarm

**Prompt**: "Build a single-page React dashboard for Legal, integrating with our Session 03 n8n Webhook."

*   Ensure your React app is properly configured by creating an n8n link to the `http://localhost:5678/webhook/swarm` URL.

### Step 3: Configure the n8n template and session

*   Download the provided `workflow_session_05.json` (just the webhook receiver) from our [Repository](https://github.com/).
*   Replace generic analogies with AI for Global Finance specific ones.
*   The n8n link should be configured to accept user queries as input.
